title: Daring Dutch Quinoa Casserole
description: A sour, bouncy-qq Dutch casserole that combines fluffy quinoa with tangy lemon, sweet tomatoes, and melted Gouda for a romantic date-night meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and lightly coat a cazuela with olive oil.
Rinse quinoa under cold water until water runs clear, then sauté it in the cazuela with 2 tbsp olive oil until lightly golden.
Add diced onion to the quinoa and cook, stirring, until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, smoked paprika, and cumin, cooking for 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth and water, bring mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes until quinoa is cooked.
Fold in halved cherry tomatoes, lemon juice, and kosher salt, mixing thoroughly.
Transfer the mixture to the cazuela, sprinkle shredded Gouda cheese evenly over the top.
Broil the casserole for 4-5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes, then garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
